faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. Cancel whenever you want — no contracts, no cancellation fees. You keep access until the end of the billing period.
faq.a2: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
faq.a3: All rehabilitation specialties: physical therapy, occupational therapy, sports rehab, neurological rehab, pediatric PT, and more.
faq.a4: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time from your billing settings. Changes take effect at the next billing cycle.
faq.a5: RehabStack is built with HIPAA-aware infrastructure. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never share patient data.

content-engine.name: Content Engine
content-engine.shortDescription: Transform voice notes, photos, and videos into professional social media content, patient education materials, and marketing copy.
content-engine.description: Content Engine is your AI-powered marketing assistant built for rehab professionals. Drop in a voice memo from your car, a quick video of a patient exercise, or a photo from the clinic — and Content Engine turns it into polished Instagram captions, patient handouts, newsletter sections, and more. It understands rehab terminology, speaks your specialty, and keeps your brand consistent across every platform. Stop spending evenings writing content. Let Content Engine handle the words while you handle the patients.

ce-matcher.name: CE Matcher
ce-matcher.shortDescription: Find the perfect continuing education courses matched to your specialty, license requirements, location, and budget.
ce-matcher.description: CE Matcher eliminates the hours you spend searching for continuing education that actually fits your life. Tell it your license state, renewal deadline, specialty focus, budget, and preferred format — live, online, or hybrid — and it surfaces the best-matched courses from hundreds of providers. It tracks your CE credits, alerts you when renewal windows open, and even suggests course sequences that build toward advanced certifications. Never scramble for last-minute CE again.

course-creator.name: Course Creator
course-creator.shortDescription: Turn your clinical expertise into a structured online course with AI-guided curriculum design, slide decks, and assessment questions.
course-creator.description: Course Creator helps rehab professionals monetize their expertise by building professional online courses in a fraction of the time. Describe your clinical knowledge area, your target audience, and your learning objectives — Course Creator generates a full curriculum outline, lesson scripts, slide deck structure, quiz questions, and even a suggested pricing strategy. Whether you want to sell on your own site or list on a major platform, Course Creator gives you the scaffolding to go from expert to educator without starting from a blank page.

onboarding.title: Become a Creator
onboarding.subtitle: Share your clinical expertise with rehab professionals worldwide.
onboarding.connectStripeDesc: We use Stripe to send you payouts. You will be redirected to Stripe to complete setup.
onboarding.successMessage: Your account is ready. Welcome to the RehabStack creator community.
terms: You retain full ownership of your agent intellectual property.
RehabStack takes 20-25% commission on managed agent subscriptions.
Agents must comply with RehabStack quality and compliance standards.
Patient data must never be stored in your agent backend.
You are responsible for keeping your agent knowledge base up to date.
RehabStack may pause or delist agents that violate terms.
Payouts are processed monthly via Stripe Connect.

announcementBar.subtext: AI assistants for physiotherapists, chiropractors & osteopaths worldwide.

hero.headline: Grow your practice while you focus on patients.
hero.subheadline: RehabStack gives you specialized AI assistants that create your social media content, find your next training course, and build online courses from your expertise — so you can grow without working more hours.
hero.trustLine2: Works in English, Spanish, Portuguese + 3 more languages
hero.trustLine3: Trusted by physiotherapists, chiropractors & osteopaths worldwide

problem.headline: The challenges every rehabilitation professional knows.
problem.subheadline: You didn't spend years studying to become a content creator, course hunter, or curriculum designer.

card1.headline: You know you should post on social media... but when?
card1.body: You finish work exhausted. Your competitor posts every day. You know content drives new patients, but you don't have 5 hours a week to create it.

card2.headline: You want to keep learning... but finding the right course is a job in itself.
card2.body: The best in-person trainings fill up in days. You hear about them too late. You don't know what's being offered in Barcelona or São Paulo next quarter.

card3.headline: You could teach a course... but where do you start?
card3.body: You've been treating shoulders for 15 years. Other clinicians ask you for advice. You could monetize that expertise, but building a course feels like a second job.

howItWorks.headline: From signup to results in under 5 minutes.
howItWorks.subheadline: No technical setup. No learning curve. Just talk to your AI assistant and get professional results.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.headline: Choose an AI assistant for your goal.
step1.body: Browse the marketplace and pick the assistant that matches your need — content creation, course finding, or expertise monetization. Start your 48-hour free trial with no charge until it ends.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.headline: Talk to it like a colleague.
step2.body: Record a voice note, upload a photo, or just type. Your AI assistant understands rehabilitation. It knows your specialty, your language, and your style.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.headline: Get professional results, ready to use.
step3.body: Content packages ready to post. Courses found and trip plans prepared. Full course curriculums built from your expertise. Review, approve, and publish.

featuredAgents.headline: Three assistants. Three practice problems solved.
featuredAgents.subheadline: Each one built specifically for rehabilitation professionals. Start any with a 48-hour free trial.

agent1.name: Content Engine
agent1.tagline: Turn voice notes into professional clinical content.
agent1.description: Record a 2-minute voice note about a patient case and get a full week of Instagram carousels, LinkedIn posts, video scripts, and blog drafts — all in your voice.
agent1.feature1: Social media content ready to post
agent1.feature2: Works in your language and tone

agent2.name: CE Concierge
agent2.tagline: Find your next course before the seats are gone.
agent2.description: Scans global course providers, matches courses to your specialty and career goals, then plans your entire trip with cost estimates — before registrations close.
agent2.feature3: Full trip planning with cost estimates
agent2.feature4: Early seat alerts for high-demand courses

agent3.name: Course Creator
agent3.tagline: Turn your expertise into an online course.
agent3.description: Record brain-dump sessions about your specialty and get a full curriculum with scripts, slides outlines, quizzes, a sales page, and a launch campaign — ready to publish.
agent3.feature1: Full curriculum from your voice notes

showcase.wantToBeFeature: Want to be featured? Share your results.

testimonial1.quote: I went from posting once a month to every day. My Instagram following doubled and I get 3x more new patient inquiries than before.

testimonial2.quote: It found a dry needling masterclass in Berlin I had no idea existed. Registration closed the next day — I would have missed it completely.
testimonial2.result: Found 4 relevant courses in first week

testimonial3.quote: I recorded 6 voice notes during my lunch breaks. Eight weeks later I had a full pelvic floor rehab course ready to sell.
